positive: A mystical celestial landscape rendered in deep indigo and burnt orange hues, featuring stylized constellations, geometric floral patterns, and glowing cosmic dust. The composition is symmetrical, forming a powerful, central silhouette ideal for apparel printing. Use a modern, clean linework style mixed with bioluminescent glow effects. Strong contrast between the dark background and the illuminated subject matter. Vector graphic aesthetic, hyper-detailed, high-contrast, suitable for screen printing.
